stories.headline: US House votes to restrict Trump Iran War powers without congressional approval

perspectives.label: Conservative
perspectives.body: Bill is a great guy who recognizes that the bureaucracy of the intel community must respond to the elected leadership (rather than the other way around). He'll do great!

perspectives.label: Independent
perspectives.body: BREAKING: The US House of Representatives has voted to restrict President Trump’s ability to continue the Iran War without congressional approval. The measure passed in a 215 to 208 vote, with four Republicans joining Democrats in support.

perspectives.label: Democrat
perspectives.body: Asked today how he feels about negotiations with Iran collapsing, Trump said, "I couldn't care less." You'd think the president of the United States would care about service members dying and millions paying more for gas because of his illegal and unconstitutional war.

stories.headline: Study estimates 1.5 million deaths from foodborne illnesses in 2021
stories.body: A new study estimated foodborne illnesses caused 1.5 million deaths worldwide in 2021. However, there are things that can be done in your home to prevent these kinds of illnesses. https://www.cnn.com/2026/06/03/health/foodborne-illness-deaths-wellness?Date=20260603&Profile=CNN&utm_content=1780526321&utm_medium=social&utm_source=twitter

stories.headline: Elon Musk criticizes Western response to racism accusations
stories.body:
The West has created an utterly evil state religion where an accusation of “racism” is the gravest offense that can be committed, even worse than rape or murder!

So if police show up at a crime scene and a British boy is bleeding out and an immigrant says the British boy is racist the cops will cuff the dying British boy.

stories.headline: Joe Rogan promotes podcast with Joe Eszterhas
stories.body:
Joe Eszterhas is a Hollywood legend.  In the 1990’s he was the highest paid writer in film, and created all time classics like “Basic Instinct.”

He lived through an insane coke and booze fueled ride of a life, and came out on the other end with some amazing stories. 
We talked about his beginnings in journalism, and the time he spent with Hunter S Thompson, Jimi Hendrix, and Martin Luther King Jr. 

He’s a brilliant and captivating guy and I really enjoyed our conversation.  The podcast is available now on @spotify and everywhere else.

stories.headline: Ideogram releases open weights for Ideogram 4.0 image model
stories.body:
Introducing Ideogram 4.0: the best open image model in the world.

Think it. Make it. Own it.

Download the weights, fine-tune on your own data, and run it on your hardware. Live on every Ideogram plan and the API today.

stories.headline: OpenAI launches GPT-Rosalind model series for life sciences research
stories.body:
We’re bringing new capabilities to GPT-Rosalind, a model series purpose-built for life sciences research at enterprise scale.

It brings GPT-5.5’s agentic coding and tool use together with stronger intelligence for drug discovery, analysis, design, and experimental workflows.

stories.headline: FBI raids $35M Southern California mansion linked to Iran sanctions

stories.headline: Newport Beach scene full of Botox and hair transplants
stories.body: Just got into Newport Beach and WOW… I’ve never seen this much Botox, hair transplants, and strategic fakeness in one zip code. It’s like the entire city got collectively “upgraded” by the same plastic surgeon who moonlights as a car salesman. 🤣🤣 10/10 for commitment to the bit though!

stories.headline: Major UFO files surfacing on National Archives servers amid official concerns.
stories.body:
🚨WATCH: A major UFO bombshell is exploding right now.  

Reported Air Force files are appearing on National Archives servers.  

Washington is visibly rattled as more whistleblowers and lawmakers get involved.  

Intelligence whispers suggest this is getting impossible to hide. 

Something very big is unfolding. 

Our Chief White House Correspondent Gary Franchi Reports @nextnews @TrumpDailyPosts

stories.headline: UFO bombshell with Air Force files on National Archives servers.
stories.body: 🚨 UFO bombshell: reported Air Force files are surfacing on National Archives servers — and Washington looks rattled. Whistleblowers, lawmakers, intelligence whispers… this is getting harder to contain. Watch before they spin it.
